total-review-csa: Total of all reviewed CSA reports
qa-remain: RB case(s) remained from previous contract.
not-enable-vcc: Cannot add Contract for the Agency that does not enable RBR.
delete-contract-term-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the contract term?
start-end-date-empty: Start Date and End Date for each Contract Year cannot be empty. Please select the appropriate calender date.
add-contract-require: Please input at least one Contract Term.
update-contract-success: The Contract Management Information has been successfully updated.
update-contract-fail: The Contract Management Information was failed to update.
add-contract-success: The Contract Management Information will be applied after this Agency is successfully created.
edit-contract-success: The Contract Management Information has been saved, and will be applied to this Agency only after clicking \"Update\".
start-end-date-wrong-input: End Date for each Contract Year must be after Start Date.
start-end-date-overlapped: Contract years cannot be overlapped. Please select a different date.
start-end-date-not-continuous: Contract years must be continuous with no gap between the next start date and the previous end date.
contract-term-not-continuous: Contract term must be continuous from the previous contract term.
end-date-less-than-start-date: End Date for each Contract Year must be after Start Date.
start-end-date-required: Start Date and End Date for each Contract Year cannot be empty. Please select the appropriate calender date.
vcc-cases-allocated-required: RB Cases Allocated cannot be empty. Please fill in the number.
vcc-cases-allocated-limit: RB Cases Allocated must be greater than 0.
vcc-cases-allocated-limit-max: RB Cases Allocated must be less than 1,000,000.
exceed-vcc-cases-limit: You have reached the allocated number of RB cases for this contract year.  Please have your Agency Manager contact the Evidence IQ sales representative to obtain additional RB cases. Thank you for using our service.
expired-vcc-contract-years: Contract has expired. Please contact your regional sales manager.
no-contract-vcc: No contract. Please contact your regional sales manager.
not-start-contract-vcc: Contract has not started yet. Please contact your regional sales manager.
